docs.title: 1. Install WireGuard
docs.text: Download and install WireGuard for your platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS).

docs.title: 2. Obtain Configuration
docs.text: Get the configuration file (.conf) or QR code from the administrator. This file contains all required connection parameters (keys, IP, endpoint).

docs.title: 3. Import Configuration
docs.text: Open WireGuard and: - Select “Add Tunnel” → “Import from file” (desktop), or - Scan the QR code (mobile)

docs.title: 4. Activate Connection
docs.text: Enable the tunnel using the toggle or “Activate” button. A successful connection will show traffic or handshake status.

docs.title: 5. Verify Connection
docs.text:
• Open a browser and check internet access
  • Optionally verify IP address change (e.g., via any “what is my IP” service)

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• Keep configuration files secure (they contain private keys)
  • Do not share credentials with others
  • Contact the administrator if the connection fails
